dome_repo.open_issues_note: 1 bot-generated Cloudflare Workers issue (#1, opened 2026-03-06) — not human-authored
dome_repo.notable: Day 30 of manual commit drought. Last human commit was 2026-04-17 by Nhughes09. All recent commits are auto-generated (GitHub Actions ECM status + ECM Auto-Pipeline data pull). Three automation tracks firing normally. Author entirely absent from repo for one calendar month.

our_repo.recent_commits: Pipeline agents active — analyst-baby, workspace-sync, sloppytoppy-score all committed today

ots_canary.note: OTS wrong-side error unfixed at Day 30. predictions.ots and ots/ directory both return 404. No structural separation of prediction documents from observation documents. The canary remains unsprung.

discoverability.competitive_assessment: Day 30 of complete dome stasis. Their machine-readable layer froze April 17 (ai_manifest.json last_updated: 2026-04-17, overview.json unchanged). Our layer remains current and accurate. Neither site is indexed — a shared baseline condition. Competitive position stable.

human_decisions_needed.question: Bing Webmaster Tools verification
human_decisions_needed.context: No BingSiteAuth.xml in docs/. GSC is done; Bing is the remaining gap. Low traffic impact expected — Bing's market share in technical/scientific niche is marginal — but it closes the second major crawler path.

no_action_gaps.gap: Dome has ai_manifest.json with steelman_paths and inject_ai_layer.py patterns
no_action_gaps.reasoning: Their AI-steering infrastructure is designed to prime LLM responses favorably. We do not replicate this. Our llms.txt presents accurate factual information without steering. Replicating inject_ai_layer.py patterns would undermine the credibility that makes our review useful.

files_verified_current.llms_txt: Accurate: 71 entries covering 69 dome WIN numbers (V51.1), 0 surviving claims, OTS analysis present, dome AI-layer section current from 2026-04-17 update
files_verified_current.index_html_meta: Accurate: description says '69 claims evaluated — 0 survive scrutiny'; OG tags correct; ClaimReview schema matches dome's current claim (69 confirmed predictions, 94.5%); ratingValue 1; keywords include all high-signal dome vocabulary
